name: grow-room-monitor
description: Pull AC Infinity sensor data twice daily and refresh the dashboard.
notes: Cron runs at 08:00 and 20:00 in the user's local timezone (default ET for Vix).
If you prefer Claude Code's built-in scheduled tasks, use the same cron expression and have the task call the grow-room-monitor skill, which calls the log_reading MCP tool.
Adjust the timezone field if the controller and user are in different zones.
